fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of purchase document.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the archived purchase order.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the location where you want the items to be placed when they are received.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the invoiced items were expected.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the purchase order archive.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure used for the item, for example bottle or piece.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item specified on the line.

fields.name: Qty. to Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that remains to be invoiced. It is calculated as Quantity - Qty. Invoiced.

fields.name: Qty. to Receive
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items that remains to be received.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item on the line.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount amount that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of amounts in the Line Amount field on the purchase lines.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, including VAT, for this line.

fields.name: Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price for one unit of the item, in LCY.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if invoice discounts can be calculated on the archived order.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the gross weight on the line is included in the total gross weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the net weight on the line is included in the total net weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the number of units per parcel on the line helps to determine the total number of units for all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the volume of one unit of the item on the line is included in the total volume of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied -to.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item's last purchase cost that includes indirect costs, such as freight that is associated with the purchase of the item.

fields.name: Quantity Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as received.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Inv. Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice discount amount for the line.

fields.name: Drop Shipment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if your vendor ships the items directly to your customer.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax area that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if this vendor charges you sales tax for purchases.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax group that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Use Tax
fields.tooltip: Specifies a U.S. sales tax that is paid on items purchased by a company that are used by the company, instead of being sold to a customer.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT product posting group. Links business transactions made for the item, resource, or G/L account with the general ledger, to account for VAT amounts resulting from trade with that record.

fields.name: Blanket Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order.

fields.name: Blanket Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order line.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, excluding any invoice discount amount, that must be paid for products on the line.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Job Line Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of planning line that was created when the project ledger entry is posted from the purchase line. If the field is empty, no planning lines were created for this entry.

fields.name: Job Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales price per unit that applies to the item or general ledger expense that will be posted.

fields.name: Job Total Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross amount of the line that the purchase line applies to.

fields.name: Job Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line amount of the project ledger entry that is related to the purchase line.

fields.name: Job Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line discount amount of the project ledger entry that is related to the purchase line.

fields.name: Job Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line discount percentage of the project ledger entry that is related to the purchase line.

fields.name: Job Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales price per unit that applies to the item or general ledger expense that will be posted.

fields.name: Job Total Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross amount of the line, in the local currency.

fields.name: Job Line Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line amount of the project ledger entry that is related to the purchase line.

fields.name: Job Line Disc. Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line discount amount of the project ledger entry that is related to the purchase line.

fields.name: Job Planning Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the project planning line number to which the usage should be linked when the Project Journal is posted. You can only link to Project Planning Lines that have the Apply Usage Link option enabled.

fields.name: Deferral Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the deferral template that governs how expenses paid with this purchase document are deferred to the different accounting periods when the expenses were incurred.

fields.name: Returns Deferral Start Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the returns deferral period.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item on the sales line is a catalog item, which means it is not normally kept in inventory.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number.

fields.name: Requested Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you want the vendor to deliver your order. The field is used to calculate the latest date you can order, as follows: requested receipt date - lead time calculation = order date. If you do not need delivery on a specific date, you can leave the field blank.

fields.name: Promised Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the vendor has promised to deliver the order.

fields.name: Lead Time Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for the amount of time it takes to replenish the item.

fields.name: Inbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time it takes to make items part of available inventory, after the items have been posted as received.

fields.name: Planned Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the item is planned to arrive in inventory. Forward calculation: planned receipt date = order date + vendor lead time (per the vendor calendar and rounded to the next working day in first the vendor calendar and then the location calendar). If no vendor calendar exists, then: planned receipt date = order date + vendor lead time (per the location calendar). Backward calculation: order date = planned receipt date - vendor lead time (per the vendor calendar and rounded to the previous working day in first the vendor calendar and then the location calendar). If no vendor calendar exists, then: order date = planned receipt date - vendor lead time (per the location calendar).

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the order was created.

fields.name: Allow Item Charge Assignment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if item charges can be assigned to the archived order.

fields.name: Return Qty. to Ship
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items that remains to be shipped.

fields.name: Return Qty. Shipped
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as shipped.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the responsibility center that is associated with the user, company, or vendor.

fields.name: No. of Fixed Asset Cards
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of fixed assets that is being purchased.

fields.name: Planning Flexibility
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the supply represented by this line is considered by the planning system when calculating action messages.
